name: @freeside-worlds/config-service
description: The config SERVICE — minimal Bun HTTP exposing GET/PUT /v1/config/:world/:surface over the config engine. The FIRST runtime in freeside-worlds. S2 (shadow-onboarding-substrate) replaced the C-1 any-bearer write stub with the FR-10 authorization floor: identity-token verification + the substrate's resolveAuthz admin_principals decision (closes R-3).
